mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.event_id, COALESCE(e.title_hr, t.description) AS event_title, t.transaction_type, t.amount, t.currency, t.status, t.description, t.created_at FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN events e ON e.id = t.event_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY t.created_at DESC, t.id DESC

SELECT e.id, e.creator_user_id, e.title_hr, e.title_en, e.where_hr, e.where_en, e.address, e.about_hr, e.about_en, e.when_iso, e.start_at, e.end_at, e.event_type, e.latitude, e.longitude, e.entrance_latitude, e.entrance_longitude, e.entry_instructions_hr, e.entry_instructions_en, e.visibility, e.attendance_mode, e.price_amount, e.price_currency, e.capacity, e.status, e.organizer_rating_average, e.organizer_rating_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_likes el_count WHERE el_count.event_id = e.id) AS like_count, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event_likes el_me WHERE el_me.event_id = e.id AND el_me.user_id = #{userId} ) AS liked_by_me, e.participant_count, ep.status AS user_participant_status FROM events e INNER JOIN event_participants ep ON ep.event_id = e.id AND ep.user_id = #{userId} AND ep.status IN ('joined', 'approved') WHERE e.creator_user_id IS NOT NULL AND e.creator_user_id <> #{userId} AND (e.status = 'finished' OR COALESCE(e.end_at, e.start_at, e.when_iso) < NOW()) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event_organizer_ratings rating WHERE rating.event_id = e.id AND rating.rater_user_id = #{userId} ) ORDER BY COALESCE(e.end_at, e.start_at, e.when_iso) DESC, e.id DESC
